text:
## Assessment: REVISE

Criteria 1–4 and 6 pass. Philox vectors, coordinate packing, purity/collision checks, million-sample statistics, endpoint handling, exponential semantics, rustdoc, and all workspace checks succeed.

### Blocking issue

`scripts/check.sh:11-13` does not fully enforce criterion 5. Its regex misses valid Cargo forms including:

- `[dependencies.rand]`
- `package = 'rand'`
- Workspace-inherited aliases such as `my_rng.workspace = true`

This contradicts the comment that aliases cannot bypass the guard. Use manifest-aware dependency inspection or cover all valid Cargo declaration forms.

```json
{"assessment":"REVISE","blockingIssues":["scripts/check.sh:11-13 uses a text regex that misses valid Cargo RNG dependency declarations such as [dependencies.rand], single-quoted package aliases, and workspace-inherited aliases, so acceptance criterion 5 is not fully enforced despite the script claiming aliases cannot bypass it."],"summary":"Philox correctness, Random123 vectors, coordinate packing, purity/collision coverage, million-sample uniform and exponential tests, endpoint handling, and rustdoc all pass. Revision is required only to make external-RNG dependency enforcement complete."}
```
